ogTitle: Lamington vs Landers Shoot: Climate Safety

heading: Lamington vs Landers Shoot — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Lamington, Queensland and Landers Shoot, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Landers Shoot has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Lamington (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Lamington or Landers Shoot safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Lamington has a flood risk score of 56/100, while Landers Shoot scores 31/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Lamington scores 36/100 for bushfire risk. Landers Shoot scores 46/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Lamington or Landers Shoot?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Landers Shoot has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.48% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
